text.title: Contractor Brief Template (Self-Contained) — Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of Contractor Brief Template (Self-Contained) must enforce.

rule.statement: The brief inlines all context the contractor needs; no links to gated docs or internal systems.
rule.rationale: External links rot or are inaccessible to the contractor; self-contained briefs survive.
<3 AC leaves the deliverable open to interpretation and produces rework cycles.

rule.statement: The brief names ≥1 mid-engagement evidence checkpoint.
rule.rationale: Without checkpoints, contractor cycles drift to final delivery before issues surface.

rule.statement: The brief names a single escalation owner (founder or delegate).
rule.rationale: Contractors without an escalation owner stall on ambiguity.

rule.statement: Rate + payment terms are inline (not 'see contract').
rule.rationale: Term ambiguity produces invoice disputes; inline terms remove ambiguity.
